question.text: Under the SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015, Schedule B requires the compliance officer to report to the board of directors at a frequency not less than:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Schedule B, Clause 1 states the compliance officer shall provide reports at such frequency as the board may stipulate but not less than once in a year. **The Trap:** Quarterly reporting might seem more appropriate given the significance of insider trading, but the minimum requirement is annual. **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM Series III-B also covers compliance officer reporting requirements. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Reports should go to the Chairman of the Audit Committee (if any) or Chairman of the Board.
